title: CK7n-H894ABC-U-GL-240703V1186-241014V1345_20241014182916
description:
Please plug in charger to OTA upgrade when power is lower than 50%.

Update Version:
CK7n-H894ABC-U-GL-241014V1345

Changed Functions:
1. Updated Google Security Patch to October 5, 2024.
2. Upgraded AI Voice Assistant for a brand-new UI, a surround light effect for assistant wakeup, and new features such as AI Search and Web Summarization, bringing you a more smarter user experience.

Fixed Issues:
Optimized for the issue of no pop-up windows for WhatsApp incoming calls when the Notifications permission is disabled.

Reminding:
1. Optimized system stability and performance while fixing other issues.
2. Visit the TECNO SPOT forum (https://tspot.tecno.com) for more information.
